narrative:
12 court of appeals district has 695,580 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.5% D−R vs -30.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
